context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise Portal is fully functional. Login with admin@edeka-test.de / EdekaTest2026! works. All 5 tabs (Dashboard, Filialen, API-Keys, Benutzer, Berichte) are working correctly. The account has 0 branches, 0 API keys, and 0 users - all showing appropriate empty states. Period selector (Heute, Woche, Monat, Jahr) works on Dashboard. CSV and PDF export buttons are present on Berichte tab. Modal for creating new branch opens and closes correctly.
